lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Arrancamos con una vision completa del problema y sus impactos mas frecuentes.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Vale, bajemos eso: que entregable mueve primero la aguja y cual solo ocupa calendario.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: La primera fase cubre diagnostico, riesgos iniciales y mapa de dependencias.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Por ejemplo, si el piloto sale bien pero no escala, que aprendiste de verdad.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Luego consolidamos hallazgos y establecemos una hoja de ruta incremental.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Y que riesgo compras si dejas gobernanza para el final cuando ya hay dependencias vivas.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Tambien revisamos costos operativos, limites tecnicos y opciones de escalado.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Entonces la contingencia buena no es un PDF, sino una salida practicable con responsables claros.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Cada etapa deja evidencia medible para facilitar decisiones informadas.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Si esas recomendaciones no cambian por madurez, seguramente eran demasiado genericas.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: La diferencia real aparece cuando cada fase deja una decision mas facil que antes.

lines.speaker: Lucia
lines.instructions: Speak in a bright, friendly, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Y si no mejora la toma de decisiones, todo el despliegue sobra aunque suene completo.

lines.speaker: Carlos
lines.instructions: Speak in a warm, confident, conversational tone. Keep pacing measured and clear with brief pauses.
lines.text: Ahi se ve si la estrategia aguanta la operacion o era solo un plan elegante.
